items.title: State management
items.description: Variables hold component and application state in every UI framework (React useState, Vue refs, etc.).

items.title: Configuration constants
items.description: const is used for API endpoints, feature flags and magic numbers that should never change at runtime.

items.title: Data transformation
items.description: Understanding value vs reference is critical when mapping, filtering and immutably updating data.

items.title: Avoiding bugs
items.description: Choosing const by default prevents an entire class of accidental-reassignment bugs.
